title: Massive Bitcoin Call Spreads Target $72,000 by Month End, Right When the Fed Meets
summary: Large traders are betting on a BTC price rise to $72,000 by the end of the month, latest options market flow suggests.
body:
Large traders are making substantial bets that Bitcoin's price will hit $72,000 by the end of the month, according to the latest options market flow. The bets are being placed through call spreads, a strategy that limits risk while aiming for significant gains. This surge coincides with a Federal Reserve meeting, which could influence market sentiment and volatility.

The options market flow indicates that these traders are confident in a short-term price surge. The Federal Reserve meeting adds an extra layer of uncertainty, as any policy changes could impact market behavior. For everyday investors, this news highlights the speculative nature of the crypto market. While large traders are betting on a price surge, individual investors should be cautious and consider the risks.
twitterThread: Massive Bitcoin call spreads target $72,000 by month end, right when the Fed meets. Latest options flow suggests large traders are betting on a BTC price rise.
Traders are using call spreads to bet on a short-term price jump. The Fed’s meeting adds extra uncertainty, but confidence is high.

If you’re investing, watch the Fed’s announcements and Bitcoin’s price. Volatility is expected, so stay informed. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-19-traders-bet-big-on-bitcoin-hitting-72000-by-months-end
standaloneTweet: Massive Bitcoin call spreads target $72,000 by month end, right when the Fed meets. Latest options flow suggests large traders are betting on a BTC price rise.
